pictures.title: 克罗马农人的艺术
pictures.summary: 冰河时期的欧洲大陆上，克罗马农人在洞穴深处用赭石与木炭绘制奔...
pictures.full_text: 冰河时期的欧洲大陆上，克罗马农人在洞穴深处用赭石与木炭绘制奔马与野牛。拉斯科洞穴壁画线条奔放，肖维岩画中的狮子栩栩如生，这些作品是人类最早的艺术创造，记录了史前猎人对自然的深刻观察。

pictures.title: 尼安德特人的世界
pictures.summary: 尼安德特人在冰河时期的欧洲荒原上用石矛围猎猛犸象，在洞穴中燃...
pictures.full_text: 尼安德特人在冰河时期的欧洲荒原上用石矛围猎猛犸象，在洞穴中燃起篝火取暖。他们照料受伤同伴，为死者举行葬礼，在熊骨上刻下标记，这些行为表明尼安德特人拥有比我们想象更丰富的精神世界。
pictures.full_text_en: During the Ice Age on the European continent, Cro-Magnon people painted galloping horses and bison deep within caves using ochre and charcoal. The Lascaux cave paintings feature bold lines, while the lions in the Chauvet cave art are vividly lifelike. These works are humanity's earliest artistic creations, recording prehistoric hunters' profound observations of nature.

pictures.title: 巨石阵的天文观测
pictures.summary: 不列颠索尔兹伯里平原上，新石器先民将重达数十吨的巨石从威尔士...
pictures.full_text: 不列颠索尔兹伯里平原上，新石器先民将重达数十吨的巨石从威尔士运来，精确排列成与夏至日出对齐的环形阵列。这座宏伟的天文祭祀建筑见证了史前人类对天文历法的深刻理解与惊人的工程能力。
pictures.full_text_en: Neanderthals hunted mammoths with stone spears on the icy plains of Ice Age Europe and lit campfires in caves for warmth. They cared for injured companions, held funerals for the dead, and carved marks on bear bones. These behaviors suggest Neanderthals possessed a richer spiritual world than previously imagined.

pictures.title: 线纹陶文化的村落
pictures.summary: 多瑙河流域的线纹陶文化先民在黄土地上建造长屋，用犁开垦田地种...
pictures.full_text: 多瑙河流域的线纹陶文化先民在黄土地上建造长屋，用犁开垦田地种植小麦。陶工在器表刻划出优美的曲线纹饰，村落周围挖掘环壕防御，农耕生活沿着河流向欧洲腹地扩展，新石器革命改变了大陆面貌。
pictures.full_text_en: On the Salisbury Plain of Britain, Neolithic people transported massive stones weighing tens of tons from Wales, precisely arranging them in a circular array aligned with the summer solstice sunrise. This magnificent astronomical and ceremonial structure testifies to prehistoric humans' profound understanding of astronomy and remarkable engineering capabilities.

pictures.title: 北欧的船葬文化
pictures.summary: 北欧的船葬墓中，酋长被安放于橡木船中，身旁陪葬着青铜剑与黄金...
pictures.full_text: 北欧的船葬墓中，酋长被安放于橡木船中，身旁陪葬着青铜剑与黄金项圈。船首朝向大海，象征亡灵将驶向来世，造船与航海的传统从新石器时代延续至维京时代，塑造了北欧文明的海上基因。
pictures.title_en: Villages of the Linear Pottery Culture
pictures.full_text_en: The Linear Pottery Culture people along the Danube built longhouses on loess soil, plowed fields and planted wheat. Potters incised elegant curvilinear designs on vessel surfaces, and villages were surrounded by defensive ditches. Agricultural life spread along rivers into the European interior, and the Neolithic Revolution transformed the continent.

pictures.title: 凯尔特人的铁器时代
pictures.summary: 凯尔特铁匠在锻炉旁打造出精美的青铜与铁制饰品，漩涡纹与兽形装...
pictures.full_text: 凯尔特铁匠在锻炉旁打造出精美的青铜与铁制饰品，漩涡纹与兽形装饰遍布武器与器皿。德鲁伊祭司在橡树林中主持祭祀，吟游诗人传唱英雄史诗，凯尔特文化在铁器时代遍布西欧。
pictures.full_text_en: In Nordic ship burials, chieftains were laid to rest in oak ships, accompanied by bronze swords and golden torcs. The prow pointed toward the sea, symbolizing the soul's voyage to the afterlife. The tradition of shipbuilding and seafaring persisted from the Neolithic to the Viking Age, shaping the maritime heritage of Nordic civilization.

pictures.title: 哈尔施塔特的盐矿
pictures.summary: 阿尔卑斯山中的哈尔施塔特居民从盐矿中开采出珍贵的岩盐，用盐腌...
pictures.full_text: 阿尔卑斯山中的哈尔施塔特居民从盐矿中开采出珍贵的岩盐，用盐腌制肉类保存食物。盐块成为贸易硬通货，换取远方的琥珀与青铜器，盐矿的财富催生了欧洲最早的铁器时代文化。
pictures.full_text_en: Celtic smiths crafted exquisite bronze and iron ornaments beside their forges, with spiral and animal motifs adorning weapons and vessels. Druid priests conducted rituals in oak groves, bards sang epic tales of heroes, and Celtic culture spread across Western Europe during the Iron Age.

pictures.title: 米诺斯的海上宫殿
pictures.summary: 克里特岛上的克诺索斯宫殿迷宫般层叠，壁画上跳跃的公牛与嬉戏的...
pictures.full_text: 克里特岛上的克诺索斯宫殿迷宫般层叠，壁画上跳跃的公牛与嬉戏的海豚色彩鲜艳。米诺斯人驾船称霸爱琴海，建立海上贸易网络，其优雅的艺术风格与先进的排水系统被誉为欧洲最早的高度文明。
pictures.full_text_en: The inhabitants of Hallstatt in the Alps mined precious rock salt from salt mines and used it to preserve meat. Salt blocks became hard currency in trade, exchanged for amber and bronze from distant lands. The wealth of the salt mines gave rise to Europe's earliest Iron Age culture.

pictures.title: 迈锡尼的狮子门
pictures.summary: 希腊本土的迈锡尼人筑起巨石城墙，狮子门上两尊石狮守护着王宫入...
pictures.full_text: 希腊本土的迈锡尼人筑起巨石城墙，狮子门上两尊石狮守护着王宫入口。武士身披青铜铠甲，以线性文字B记录库存与贡赋，迈锡尼文明是荷马史诗中特洛伊战争的历史背景，也是希腊青铜时代的最后辉煌。
pictures.full_text_en: The Palace of Knossos on Crete cascades in labyrinthine layers, with vibrant frescoes depicting leaping bulls and playful dolphins. The Minoans dominated the Aegean Sea with their ships, establishing maritime trade networks. Their elegant artistic style and advanced drainage systems are regarded as Europe's earliest high civilization.

pictures.title: 特洛伊战争的遗迹
pictures.summary: 小亚细亚西北的特洛伊城在战火中化为废墟，谢里曼依据荷马史诗的...
pictures.full_text: 小亚细亚西北的特洛伊城在战火中化为废墟，谢里曼依据荷马史诗的指引在此发掘出普里阿摩斯的宝藏。特洛伊战争的真实性终获考古印证，神话与历史在此交汇，照亮了爱琴海的青铜时代。
pictures.full_text_en: The Mycenaeans on the Greek mainland built massive stone walls, with two stone lions on the Lion Gate guarding the palace entrance. Warriors wore bronze armor and used Linear B script to record inventories and tributes. Mycenaean civilization is the historical backdrop for the Trojan War in Homer's epics and the final glory of the Greek Bronze Age.

pictures.title: 伊特鲁里亚的墓葬
pictures.summary: 伊特鲁里亚人在塔尔奎尼亚的地下凿出精美的墓室，壁画上描绘着宴...
pictures.full_text: 伊特鲁里亚人在塔尔奎尼亚的地下凿出精美的墓室，壁画上描绘着宴饮舞蹈与狩猎场景。贵族身披紫色长袍，乐师吹奏双管笛，伊特鲁里亚人热爱生活的态度通过墓葬艺术流传至今，深刻影响了罗马文明。
pictures.full_text_en: The city of Troy in northwestern Asia Minor was reduced to ruins by war. Schliemann, guided by Homer's epics, excavated Priam's treasure here. The historicity of the Trojan War was finally confirmed by archaeology. Myth and history converge here, illuminating the Bronze Age of the Aegean.

pictures.title: 希腊殖民运动
pictures.summary: 公元前八世纪起，希腊人驾船出海，从黑海到西西里建立数百个殖民...
pictures.full_text: 公元前八世纪起，希腊人驾船出海，从黑海到西西里建立数百个殖民城邦。每个殖民地都复制母城的制度与神庙，橄榄油与葡萄酒装在双耳瓶中运往各地，希腊文明从爱琴海扩展到整个地中海。
pictures.full_text_en: The Etruscans carved exquisite tomb chambers underground at Tarquinia, with frescoes depicting banquets, dancing, and hunting scenes. Nobles wore purple robes, musicians played double flutes. The Etruscans' love of life has been preserved through funerary art, profoundly influencing Roman civilization.

pictures.title: 维纳斯雕像的诞生
pictures.summary: 旧石器时代的工匠用石灰岩雕刻出威伦道夫的维纳斯，夸张的胸部与...
pictures.full_text: 旧石器时代的工匠用石灰岩雕刻出威伦道夫的维纳斯，夸张的胸部与臀部象征生育与丰饶。这尊仅十一厘米高的小雕像承载着远古人类对女性生殖力的崇拜，是欧洲最古老的艺术杰作之一。
pictures.full_text_en: From the 8th century BC, Greeks sailed forth to establish hundreds of colonial city-states from the Black Sea to Sicily. Each colony replicated the institutions and temples of its mother city. Olive oil and wine were transported in amphorae across the Mediterranean, and Greek civilization expanded from the Aegean to the entire Mediterranean.

pictures.title: 斯堪的纳维亚的岩画
pictures.summary: 北欧岩画上刻划着捕鲸与划船的场景，红赭石颜料描绘出猎人追逐驯...
pictures.full_text: 北欧岩画上刻划着捕鲸与划船的场景，红赭石颜料描绘出猎人追逐驯鹿的画面。这些岩画记录了极地先民在严酷自然环境中的生存智慧，船只与渔猎图案展现了北欧海洋文化的远古源头。
pictures.full_text_en: Paleolithic artisans carved the Venus of Willendorf from limestone, with exaggerated breasts and hips symbolizing fertility and abundance. This small figurine, only eleven centimeters tall, carries ancient humanity's reverence for female reproductive power and is one of Europe's oldest artistic masterpieces.

pictures.title: 欧洲的巨石文化
pictures.summary: 从马耳他的神庙到法国卡纳克的石阵，巨石建筑遍布西欧海岸。新石...
pictures.full_text: 从马耳他的神庙到法国卡纳克的石阵，巨石建筑遍布西欧海岸。新石器先民用滚木与绳索搬运百吨巨石，排列成行或围成圆圈，巨石文化是欧洲史前最壮观的建筑遗产，其用途至今仍是未解之谜。
pictures.full_text_en: Nordic rock carvings depict scenes of whaling and rowing, with red ochre pigments portraying hunters chasing reindeer. These rock art records reflect the survival wisdom of polar peoples in harsh natural environments. Ship and fishing motifs reveal the ancient origins of Nordic maritime culture.

pictures.title: 新石器时代的贸易网络
pictures.summary: 燧石从丹麦运往莱茵河流域，琥珀从波罗的海流通到地中海，绿岩斧...
pictures.full_text: 燧石从丹麦运往莱茵河流域，琥珀从波罗的海流通到地中海，绿岩斧从阿尔卑斯山交换到不列颠。新石器时代的贸易网络已跨越千里，稀有材料的流通催生了最早的职业商人与运输路线。
pictures.full_text_en: From the temples of Malta to the stone alignments of Carnac in France, megalithic structures dot the Western European coastline. Neolithic people used rollers and ropes to transport hundred-ton stones, arranging them in rows or circles. Megalithic culture is Europe's most spectacular prehistoric architectural heritage, and its purpose remains an unsolved mystery.

pictures.title: 欧洲早期的冶金术
pictures.summary: 巴尔干半岛的先民率先掌握了铜的冶炼技术，将铜矿石在陶罐中加热...
pictures.full_text: 巴尔干半岛的先民率先掌握了铜的冶炼技术，将铜矿石在陶罐中加热熔炼。铜制工具与饰品比石器更锋利更美观，冶金术的发明开启了金属时代，从此技术进步不断加速，改变了欧洲社会的面貌。
pictures.full_text_en: Flint was transported from Denmark to the Rhine basin, amber circulated from the Baltic to the Mediterranean, and greenstone axes were traded from the Alps to Britain. Neolithic trade networks spanned thousands of miles, and the circulation of rare materials gave rise to the earliest professional merchants and transport routes.

pictures.title: 钟形杯文化的扩张
pictures.summary: 钟形杯文化从伊比利亚半岛向东扩展，携带铜制匕首与钟形陶器的族...
pictures.full_text: 钟形杯文化从伊比利亚半岛向东扩展，携带铜制匕首与钟形陶器的族群穿越欧洲大陆。他们是早期的金属工匠与商人，将冶金技术与新的丧葬习俗传播到各地，钟形杯文化是欧洲青铜时代的前奏。
pictures.full_text_en: The people of the Balkans were the first to master copper smelting technology, heating copper ore in ceramic vessels. Copper tools and ornaments were sharper and more beautiful than stone ones. The invention of metallurgy ushered in the Metal Age, accelerating technological progress and transforming European society.

pictures.title: 乌克兰的库尔干墓
pictures.summary: 黑海北岸草原上，原始印欧人用土堆垒起高大的库尔干墓葬，墓中陪...
pictures.full_text: 黑海北岸草原上，原始印欧人用土堆垒起高大的库尔干墓葬，墓中陪葬着马车与马具。骑马的游牧民族从这里向东西迁徙，将印欧语系传播到从印度到爱尔兰的辽阔地域，重塑了欧亚大陆的语言版图。
pictures.title_en: Expansion of the Bell Beaker Culture
pictures.full_text_en: The Bell Beaker Culture expanded eastward from the Iberian Peninsula, with groups carrying copper daggers and bell-shaped pottery crossing the European continent. They were early metalworkers and merchants, spreading metallurgical technology and new burial customs. The Bell Beaker Culture was the prelude to the European Bronze Age.

pictures.title: 欧洲农业的传播
pictures.summary: 来自安纳托利亚的农耕者沿地中海海岸与多瑙河谷地向欧洲腹地推进...
pictures.full_text: 来自安纳托利亚的农耕者沿地中海海岸与多瑙河谷地向欧洲腹地推进，带来了小麦种子与驯化的牛羊。狩猎采集者逐渐接受农耕生活，森林被开垦为农田，定居村落取代了游动营地，欧洲进入了新石器时代。
pictures.full_text_en: On the steppes north of the Black Sea, Proto-Indo-Europeans raised tall kurgan burial mounds, interring chariots and horse gear with the dead. Nomadic horsemen migrated east and west from here, spreading the Indo-European language family across a vast territory from India to Ireland, reshaping the linguistic map of Eurasia.

pictures.title: 雅典民主的诞生
pictures.summary: 克里斯提尼在雅典推行改革，以地域部落取代血缘氏族，公民大会成...
pictures.full_text: 克里斯提尼在雅典推行改革，以地域部落取代血缘氏族，公民大会成为最高权力机构。六千公民在帕尼克斯山丘上投票决定城邦大事，陶片放逐法防止僭主出现，雅典开创了人类历史上最彻底的直接民主制度。
pictures.full_text_en: Farmers from Anatolia advanced into the European interior along the Mediterranean coast and the Danube valley, bringing wheat seeds and domesticated cattle and sheep. Hunter-gatherers gradually adopted agricultural life, forests were cleared for farmland, and settled villages replaced nomadic camps. Europe entered the Neolithic Age.

pictures.title: 斯巴达的军事训练
pictures.summary: 斯巴达男童七岁即被编入连队，赤足奔跑忍饥受寒，在鞭笞中磨砺意...
pictures.full_text: 斯巴达男童七岁即被编入连队，赤足奔跑忍饥受寒，在鞭笞中磨砺意志。三十岁方获完整公民权，终身以军营为家，斯巴达战士以方阵冲锋所向披靡，温泉关三百勇士的壮举成为军事史上永恒的传奇。

pictures.title: 马拉松战役
pictures.summary: 波斯大军渡海远征雅典，一万一千名雅典重装步兵在马拉松平原迎战...
pictures.full_text: 波斯大军渡海远征雅典，一万一千名雅典重装步兵在马拉松平原迎战数倍于己的敌军。雅典方阵以两翼包抄之策击溃波斯阵线，斐迪庇第斯奔跑四十公里传回胜利消息后力竭而亡，马拉松成为勇气的象征。
pictures.full_text_en: Cleisthenes implemented reforms in Athens, replacing kinship clans with territorial tribes, and the Assembly became the supreme authority. Six thousand citizens voted on city-state affairs on the Pnyx hill, and ostracism prevented the rise of tyrants. Athens pioneered the most thorough direct democracy in human history.

pictures.title: 伯罗奔尼撒战争
pictures.summary: 雅典与斯巴达之间长达二十七年的战争撕裂了希腊世界。雅典的海上...
pictures.full_text: 雅典与斯巴达之间长达二十七年的战争撕裂了希腊世界。雅典的海上霸权与斯巴达的陆军优势反复交锋，瘟疫肆虐城邦，远征西西里惨败，公元前四〇四年雅典投降，黄金时代终结，希腊城邦从此走向衰落。
pictures.full_text_en: Spartan boys were enrolled in companies at age seven, running barefoot, enduring hunger and cold, and tempering their will through flogging. Full citizenship was granted at thirty, and soldiers lived in barracks for life. Spartan warriors were invincible in phalanx charges, and the heroic stand of the Three Hundred at Thermopylae became an eternal legend in military history.

pictures.title: 苏格拉底之死
pictures.summary: 七十一岁的苏格拉底被雅典法庭以腐蚀青年与不敬神灵之罪判处死刑...
pictures.full_text: 七十一岁的苏格拉底被雅典法庭以腐蚀青年与不敬神灵之罪判处死刑。他拒绝朋友安排的越狱，在狱中平静饮下毒堇汁，临终嘱咐友人向医神献祭一只公鸡，以死捍卫了哲人的良知与法律的尊严。
pictures.full_text_en: Greek city-states along the Aegean were independent yet shared a cultural identity, with Athenian democracy and Spartan militarism forming two poles. Citizens debated state affairs in the agora, and city-states observed truces during the Olympic Games. The Greek polis system nurtured the origins of Western political thought, and great wisdom emerged from small states.

pictures.title: 柏拉图学园
pictures.summary: 柏拉图在雅典城外购地创建学园，门楣上刻着不懂几何者不得入内。...
pictures.full_text: 柏拉图在雅典城外购地创建学园，门楣上刻着不懂几何者不得入内。他在这里讲授理念论，对话录中苏格拉底的追问启发了无数心灵，亚里士多德在此求学二十年，学园延续了九百年，是西方世界最早的高等学府。
pictures.full_text_en: In the 5th century BC, Athenian citizens voted on state affairs on the Pnyx hill. The Council of Five Hundred was selected by lot, and juries were composed of citizens. Periclean democracy enabled every citizen to participate in politics. Though it excluded women and slaves, it was a great beginning of democratic practice in human history.

pictures.title: 亚历山大东征
pictures.summary: 亚历山大大帝率马其顿希腊联军从希腊出发，先后击败波斯大军、征...
pictures.full_text: 亚历山大大帝率马其顿希腊联军从希腊出发，先后击败波斯大军、征服埃及、攻入印度。他在所到之处建立希腊式城市，将希腊文化传播到东方，希腊化时代由此开启，东西方文明在帝国废墟上碰撞融合。
pictures.full_text_en: Aristotle constructed the framework of Western knowledge, from physics to ethics, from logic to politics, classifying nearly all human knowledge of his time. Syllogistic logic became a tool of thought for two millennia, and teleological explanations dominated medieval science. He was the encyclopedic founder of Western scholarship.

pictures.title: 罗马共和国的扩张
pictures.summary: 罗马军团从意大利半岛出发，经三次布匿战争消灭迦太基，征服马其...
pictures.full_text: 罗马军团从意大利半岛出发，经三次布匿战争消灭迦太基，征服马其顿与塞琉古。罗马大道延伸到行省各地，总督与包税人治理着辽阔的领土，共和国的疆域从西班牙扩展到小亚细亚，地中海成为罗马的内湖。
pictures.full_text_en: The Ptolemaic dynasty built the ancient world's largest library in Alexandria, housing 700,000 scrolls. Scholars here measured the Earth's circumference, compiled critical editions of Homer, and translated the Hebrew Bible. The Library of Alexandria was the knowledge center of the ancient world, where the wisdom of Mediterranean civilizations converged and burned bright.

pictures.title: 凯撒征服高卢
pictures.summary: 凯撒率罗马军团渡过卢比孔河，在高卢战场上击败维钦托利的联军。...
pictures.full_text: 凯撒率罗马军团渡过卢比孔河，在高卢战场上击败维钦托利的联军。阿莱西亚围城战中罗马工事层层围困，高卢英雄最终投降，凯撒在《高卢战记》中记录了这场征服，高卢从此成为罗马的一个行省。
pictures.full_text_en: Alexander the Great led the Macedonian-Greek forces from Greece, successively defeating the Persian army, conquering Egypt, and advancing into India. He founded Greek-style cities wherever he went, spreading Greek culture to the East. The Hellenistic Age thus began, and Eastern and Western civilizations collided and merged on the ruins of empires.

pictures.title: 罗马帝国的黄金时代
pictures.summary: 奥古斯都开创的罗马和平延续两百年，万神殿穹顶下的天光照亮大理...
pictures.full_text: 奥古斯都开创的罗马和平延续两百年，万神殿穹顶下的天光照亮大理石神像。罗马大道连接从不列颠到叙利亚的行省，水渠将清水引入城市浴场，拉丁语与罗马法成为西方文明的基石，帝国繁荣达到巅峰。
pictures.full_text_en: Roman legions set out from the Italian peninsula, destroying Carthage through three Punic Wars and conquering Macedonia and the Seleucid Empire. Roman roads extended to the provinces, governors and tax collectors governed vast territories, and the Republic's borders stretched from Spain to Asia Minor. The Mediterranean became Rome's inland sea.

pictures.title: 希腊戏剧的诞生
pictures.summary: 雅典酒神节的露天剧场中，演员戴着夸张面具在舞台上表演。埃斯库...
pictures.full_text: 雅典酒神节的露天剧场中，演员戴着夸张面具在舞台上表演。埃斯库罗斯的《波斯人》再现了萨拉米海战，索福克勒斯的《俄狄浦斯王》探讨了命运与自由意志，希腊悲剧是西方文学与戏剧传统的源头。
pictures.full_text_en: From a city-state on the Tiber to master of the Mediterranean, the Roman Republic defeated Carthage through three Punic Wars and conquered Macedonia and the Seleucid Empire. The Senate directed wars and allocated provinces, Roman legions were invincible, and the Republic's expansion transformed the Mediterranean world while laying the groundwork for empire.

pictures.title: 奥林匹克竞技会
pictures.summary: 公元前七七六年，首届奥林匹克竞技会在伯罗奔尼撒的奥林匹亚举行...
pictures.full_text: 公元前七七六年，首届奥林匹克竞技会在伯罗奔尼撒的奥林匹亚举行。赤身裸体的运动员在赛跑与摔跤中角逐桂冠，获胜者戴上野橄榄枝花冠，各城邦在竞技期间停战，体育竞赛成为希腊人和平与卓越的象征。
pictures.title_en: The Golden Age of the Roman Empire
pictures.full_text_en: The Pax Romana inaugurated by Augustus lasted two centuries. Light through the Pantheon's dome illuminated marble statues. Roman roads connected provinces from Britain to Syria, aqueducts brought fresh water to urban baths, and Latin and Roman law became the foundations of Western civilization. Imperial prosperity reached its zenith.

pictures.title: 帕特农神庙的建造
pictures.summary: 伯里克利主持在雅典卫城上建造帕特农神庙，多立克柱廊环绕着黄金...
pictures.full_text: 伯里克利主持在雅典卫城上建造帕特农神庙，多立克柱廊环绕着黄金象牙的雅典娜巨像。建筑师以视觉校正技术让直线微曲以显笔直，浮雕描绘泛雅典娜节的盛大游行，帕特农是古希腊建筑艺术的最高成就。
pictures.full_text_en: In the open-air theater of the Athenian Dionysia, actors performed wearing exaggerated masks. Aeschylus's "The Persians" recreated the Battle of Salamis, Sophocles's "Oedipus Rex" explored fate and free will. Greek tragedy is the origin of the Western literary and theatrical tradition.

pictures.title: 罗马斗兽场
pictures.summary: 弗拉维安圆形剧场可容纳五万观众，角斗士在沙场上殊死搏斗，猛兽...
pictures.full_text: 弗拉维安圆形剧场可容纳五万观众，角斗士在沙场上殊死搏斗，猛兽从地下通道被升降机送上场地。观众席按等级分区，皇帝拇指朝下决定败者生死，斗兽场是罗马帝国权力与娱乐文化的壮观象征。
pictures.full_text_en: In 776 BC, the first Olympic Games were held at Olympia in the Peloponnese. Naked athletes competed in running and wrestling for glory, victors were crowned with wild olive wreaths, and city-states observed truces during the Games. Athletic competition became a symbol of peace and excellence for the Greeks.

pictures.title: 罗马法的发展
pictures.summary: 从十二铜表法到查士丁尼法典，罗马法经历了从习惯法到成文法的漫...
pictures.full_text: 从十二铜表法到查士丁尼法典，罗马法经历了从习惯法到成文法的漫长演进。法学家区分了公法与私法，确立了所有权与契约原则，罗马法成为大陆法系的源头，至今仍影响着世界各国的法律制度。
pictures.full_text_en: Pericles oversaw the construction of the Parthenon on the Athenian Acropolis, with Doric colonnades surrounding the chryselephantine statue of Athena. Architects used optical corrections to make slight curves appear straight, and friezes depicted the grand procession of the Panathenaic Festival. The Parthenon is the supreme achievement of ancient Greek architecture.

pictures.title: 希腊哲学的黄金时代
pictures.summary: 从泰勒斯追问万物本原到亚里士多德建立逻辑学体系，希腊哲学家在...
pictures.full_text: 从泰勒斯追问万物本原到亚里士多德建立逻辑学体系，希腊哲学家在雅典的广场与学园中自由辩论。柏拉图的理念论与亚里士多德的实体说奠定了西方哲学的基本框架，理性精神从此成为希腊文明最珍贵的遗产。
pictures.full_text_en: The Flavian Amphitheatre could seat 50,000 spectators. Gladiators fought to the death on the sand, and wild beasts were raised by elevators from underground passages. Seating was arranged by social rank, and the emperor's thumbs-down decided the fate of the defeated. The Colosseum was a spectacular symbol of Roman imperial power and entertainment culture.

pictures.title: 罗马的道路工程
pictures.summary: 罗马工程师在帝国各地铺设了总长八万公里的石铺大道，道路笔直穿...
pictures.full_text: 罗马工程师在帝国各地铺设了总长八万公里的石铺大道，道路笔直穿越山脉与沼泽。每隔罗马里设里程碑，沿途驿站提供换马与住宿，条条大路通罗马不仅是谚语，更是帝国统治与商业流通的物质保障。
pictures.full_text_en: From the Twelve Tables to the Justinian Code, Roman law underwent a long evolution from customary to written law. Jurists distinguished between public and private law, established principles of ownership and contract. Roman law became the source of the civil law system and continues to influence legal systems worldwide.

pictures.title: 希腊化时代的科学
pictures.summary: 亚历山大城的学者们测量了地球周长，阿基米德在浴缸中发现了浮力...
pictures.full_text: 亚历山大城的学者们测量了地球周长，阿基米德在浴缸中发现了浮力原理。欧几里得编写《几何原本》，希罗发明蒸汽玩具，希腊化时代的科学研究达到了古代世界的最高水平，为近代科学革命播下了种子。
pictures.title_en: The Golden Age of Greek Philosophy
pictures.full_text_en: From Thales inquiring into the nature of all things to Aristotle establishing the system of logic, Greek philosophers freely debated in Athens' agora and academies. Plato's Theory of Forms and Aristotle's substance theory laid the basic framework of Western philosophy. The spirit of reason became Greek civilization's most precious legacy.

pictures.title: 罗马的水渠工程
pictures.summary: 罗马工程师在山谷间架设多层拱桥引水渠，将数十公里外的山泉引入...
pictures.full_text: 罗马工程师在山谷间架设多层拱桥引水渠，将数十公里外的山泉引入城市。水渠每日输送百万立方米清水，供应浴场喷泉与公共厕所，供水系统的规模与精密程度在此后一千年间无人超越。
pictures.full_text_en: Roman engineers laid 80,000 kilometers of paved roads across the empire, with roads running straight through mountains and marshes. Milestones were placed every Roman mile, and way stations provided fresh horses and lodging. "All roads lead to Rome" was not merely a proverb but the material foundation of imperial governance and commercial circulation.

pictures.title: 西罗马帝国的覆灭
pictures.summary: 公元四七六年，日耳曼雇佣军首领奥多亚克废黜末代罗马皇帝，西罗...
pictures.full_text: 公元四七六年，日耳曼雇佣军首领奥多亚克废黜末代罗马皇帝，西罗马帝国正式灭亡。蛮族在帝国废墟上建立王国，古典文明遭受重创，欧洲进入中世纪，但罗马的法律、语言与基督教信仰在废墟中延续。
pictures.full_text_en: Scholars in Alexandria measured the Earth's circumference, and Archimedes discovered the principle of buoyancy in his bath. Euclid wrote "The Elements," and Hero invented a steam toy. Hellenistic scientific research reached the highest level of the ancient world, sowing the seeds for the modern scientific revolution.

pictures.title: 查理曼大帝加冕
pictures.summary: 公元八〇〇年圣诞节，教皇利奥三世在罗马圣彼得大教堂为法兰克国...
pictures.full_text: 公元八〇〇年圣诞节，教皇利奥三世在罗马圣彼得大教堂为法兰克国王查理曼加冕为罗马人的皇帝。查理曼宫廷中汇聚学者与抄写员，加洛林文艺复兴点亮了黑暗时代的文化曙光，欧洲开始从废墟中重建。
pictures.full_text_en: Roman engineers built multi-tiered arched aqueducts across valleys, channeling mountain springs from dozens of kilometers away into cities. The aqueducts delivered a million cubic meters of fresh water daily, supplying baths, fountains, and public latrines. The scale and precision of the water supply system remained unsurpassed for a thousand years.

pictures.title: 维京人的远航
pictures.summary: 维京长船从斯堪的纳维亚峡湾出发，劫掠者沿河流深入欧洲腹地，殖...
pictures.full_text: 维京长船从斯堪的纳维亚峡湾出发，劫掠者沿河流深入欧洲腹地，殖民者抵达冰岛与格陵兰。莱夫·埃里克森在纽芬兰登陆，比哥伦布早五百年到达美洲，维京人是中世纪最杰出的航海者与最令人畏惧的战士。
pictures.title_en: Fall of the Western Roman Empire
pictures.full_text_en: In 476 AD, the Germanic mercenary leader Odoacer deposed the last Roman emperor, and the Western Roman Empire officially fell. Barbarians established kingdoms on the empire's ruins, classical civilization suffered a severe blow, and Europe entered the Middle Ages. Yet Roman law, language, and the Christian faith endured amid the ruins.

pictures.title: 诺曼征服英格兰
pictures.summary: 一〇六六年，诺曼底公爵威廉在黑斯廷斯战役中击败英格兰国王哈罗...
pictures.full_text: 一〇六六年，诺曼底公爵威廉在黑斯廷斯战役中击败英格兰国王哈罗德，一箭射穿哈罗德眼睛。威廉加冕为英王，法语成为宫廷语言，封建制度引入不列颠，诺曼征服彻底改变了英国的历史进程。

pictures.title: 十字军东征
pictures.summary: 一〇九六年，教皇乌尔班二世号召基督徒收复圣地，数万骑士踏上东...
pictures.full_text: 一〇九六年，教皇乌尔班二世号召基督徒收复圣地，数万骑士踏上东征之路。十字军攻陷耶路撒冷后建立拉丁王国，东方的香料与丝绸随归来的骑士流入欧洲，十字军东征深刻改变了东西方关系与欧洲社会。
pictures.full_text_en: Charlemagne established palace schools at Aachen and invited the scholar Alcuin to lead educational reform. Monks copied classical texts, preserving the Latin literary heritage. Carolingian minuscule improved writing efficiency, and palaces and monasteries became centers of cultural revival, lighting the lamp of knowledge transmission through the Dark Ages.

pictures.title: 黑死病席卷欧洲
pictures.summary: 一三四七年，黑死病从热那亚商船传入西西里，三年内夺走欧洲三分...
pictures.full_text: 一三四七年，黑死病从热那亚商船传入西西里，三年内夺走欧洲三分之一人口。村庄沦为鬼域，农田荒芜，劳动力短缺迫使领主提高农奴待遇，黑死病在毁灭中催生了社会变革，中世纪秩序开始瓦解。
pictures.full_text_en: Viking longships set out from Scandinavian fjords. Raiders penetrated deep into Europe along rivers, while colonists reached Iceland and Greenland. Leif Erikson landed in Newfoundland, reaching America five centuries before Columbus. The Vikings were the most accomplished seafarers and most feared warriors of the Middle Ages.

pictures.title: 哥特式大教堂
pictures.summary: 巴黎圣母院的飞扶壁支撑着高耸的尖拱穹顶，彩色玻璃窗将阳光化为...
pictures.full_text: 巴黎圣母院的飞扶壁支撑着高耸的尖拱穹顶，彩色玻璃窗将阳光化为斑斓的光影。石匠与玻璃匠耗时数十年建造这些通向天国的建筑，哥特式大教堂是中世纪信仰与工程技术的最高结晶。
pictures.full_text_en: In 1066, Duke William of Normandy defeated King Harold of England at the Battle of Hastings, an arrow piercing Harold's eye. William was crowned King of England, French became the court language, and the feudal system was introduced to Britain. The Norman Conquest fundamentally changed the course of English history.

pictures.title: 神圣罗马帝国
pictures.summary: 奥托一世在罗马加冕为皇帝，建立神圣罗马帝国。皇帝与教皇为任命...
pictures.full_text: 奥托一世在罗马加冕为皇帝，建立神圣罗马帝国。皇帝与教皇为任命主教的权力争斗不休，诸侯在帝国议会中各怀心思，帝国既不神圣也不罗马更不统一，却是中世纪欧洲政治秩序的重要支柱。
pictures.full_text_en: Medieval European knights were both armed nobles and devout Christians, loyal to their lords, protecting the weak and defending the faith. Dubbing ceremonies were solemn and sacred, lances clashed with sparks at tournaments, and tales of King Arthur and the Knights of the Round Table endure in chivalric literature. Chivalry shaped Europe's concept of honor.

pictures.title: 中世纪的骑士制度
pictures.summary: 年轻贵族从侍童晋升为侍从，在授剑仪式上被授予骑士称号。骑士宣...
pictures.full_text: 年轻贵族从侍童晋升为侍从，在授剑仪式上被授予骑士称号。骑士宣誓效忠领主、保护弱者、捍卫信仰，比武大会上骑士身披纹章冲锋比拼，骑士制度是中世纪欧洲军事与道德规范的核心。
pictures.full_text_en: In 1347, the Black Death arrived in Sicily from Genoese merchant ships, claiming one-third of Europe's population within three years. Villages became ghost towns, farmland lay abandoned, and labor shortages forced lords to improve serfs' conditions. The Black Death catalyzed social change amid devastation, and the medieval order began to crumble.

pictures.title: 中世纪大学的兴起
pictures.summary: 博洛尼亚大学的学生行会聘请教授讲授罗马法，巴黎大学的经院哲学...
pictures.full_text: 博洛尼亚大学的学生行会聘请教授讲授罗马法，巴黎大学的经院哲学家辩论信仰与理性。大学授予学位制定课程，学术自由与自治特权受到教皇与皇帝的保护，中世纪大学是现代高等教育制度的源头。
pictures.full_text_en: The flying buttresses of Notre-Dame de Paris support soaring pointed vaults, and stained glass windows transform sunlight into a kaleidoscope of colors. Stonemasons and glaziers spent decades building these structures reaching toward heaven. Gothic cathedrals are the supreme crystallization of medieval faith and engineering.

pictures.title: 英法百年战争
pictures.summary: 一三三七年英法因王位继承开战，战争断续延续一百一十六年。阿金...
pictures.full_text: 一三三七年英法因王位继承开战，战争断续延续一百一十六年。阿金库尔战役中英军长弓手击溃法国骑士，圣女贞德率军解奥尔良之围后火刑殉难，百年战争催生了两国民族意识，中世纪封建军事体系走向终结。
pictures.full_text_en: Otto I was crowned emperor in Rome, establishing the Holy Roman Empire. Emperors and popes struggled incessantly over the right to appoint bishops, and princes pursued their own interests in the Imperial Diet. The empire was neither holy, nor Roman, nor united, yet it remained an important pillar of the medieval European political order.

pictures.title: 封建庄园经济
pictures.summary: 领主的庄园是中世纪欧洲基本的经济单位，农奴在领主自营地上劳作...
pictures.full_text: 领主的庄园是中世纪欧洲基本的经济单位，农奴在领主自营地上劳作，在份地上耕种自给。磨坊与烤炉由领主垄断，农奴使用须缴纳费用，庄园自给自足，封建经济在黑死病后逐渐让位于货币地租。
pictures.full_text_en: Young nobles progressed from page to squire and were knighted in a dubbing ceremony. Knights swore oaths to serve their lords, protect the weak, and defend the faith. At tournaments, knights charged in heraldic armor. The knightly institution was the core of medieval European military and moral codes.

pictures.title: 修道院的抄写室
pictures.summary: 本笃会修士在修道院抄写室中俯首誊抄古典手稿，用鹅毛笔在羊皮纸...
pictures.full_text: 本笃会修士在修道院抄写室中俯首誊抄古典手稿，用鹅毛笔在羊皮纸上书写拉丁文。彩饰字母以金箔与矿物颜料装饰，每本经卷都是艺术品，修道院是黑暗时代知识的避风港，古典文明在修士笔下得以保存。
pictures.full_text_en: Student guilds at the University of Bologna hired professors to teach Roman law, while scholastic philosophers at the University of Paris debated faith and reason. Universities granted degrees and established curricula, and academic freedom and autonomy were protected by popes and emperors. Medieval universities are the origins of the modern higher education system.

pictures.title: 汉萨同盟的贸易
pictures.summary: 吕贝克与汉堡的商人结成汉萨同盟，控制着从伦敦到诺夫哥罗德的波...
pictures.full_text: 吕贝克与汉堡的商人结成汉萨同盟，控制着从伦敦到诺夫哥罗德的波罗的海贸易。同盟舰队护航商船，同盟商站遍布北欧港口，咸鲱鱼与琥珀是主要商品，汉萨同盟是中世纪欧洲最强大的商业联盟。
pictures.full_text_en: In 1337, England and France went to war over the succession, with hostilities continuing intermittently for 116 years. English longbowmen shattered French knights at Agincourt, and Joan of Arc lifted the siege of Orléans before being burned at the stake. The Hundred Years' War fostered national consciousness in both countries and marked the end of the medieval feudal military system.

pictures.title: 西班牙收复失地
pictures.summary: 基督教王国从比利牛斯山向南推进，逐步收复被摩尔人占领的领土。...
pictures.full_text: 基督教王国从比利牛斯山向南推进，逐步收复被摩尔人占领的领土。一四九二年格拉纳达陷落，末代苏丹交出城钥匙，七百年的收复运动终告完成，西班牙统一后随即资助哥伦布西航，大航海时代由此开启。
pictures.full_text_en: The lord's manor was the basic economic unit of medieval Europe. Serfs worked on the lord's demesne and cultivated their own plots for subsistence. Mills and ovens were monopolized by the lord, and serfs paid fees to use them. The manor was self-sufficient, and the feudal economy gradually gave way to money rents after the Black Death.

pictures.title: 中世纪的朝圣之路
pictures.summary: 信徒从欧洲各地徒步前往圣地亚哥-德孔波斯特拉朝拜使徒雅各的遗...
pictures.full_text: 信徒从欧洲各地徒步前往圣地亚哥-德孔波斯特拉朝拜使徒雅各的遗骨。朝圣之路沿途设有旅舍与教堂，朝圣者佩戴贝壳标志结伴而行，这条千年古道是中世纪欧洲最重要的信仰之旅与文化通道。
pictures.full_text_en: Benedictine monks in monastery scriptoria bent over classical manuscripts, writing Latin on parchment with quill pens. Illuminated letters were decorated with gold leaf and mineral pigments. Each codex was a work of art. Monasteries were havens of knowledge during the Dark Ages, and classical civilization was preserved through the monks' pens.

pictures.title: 蒙古入侵欧洲
pictures.summary: 一二四一年蒙古骑兵在利格尼茨战役中大败波兰与条顿骑士联军，速...
pictures.full_text: 一二四一年蒙古骑兵在利格尼茨战役中大败波兰与条顿骑士联军，速不台的铁骑直抵维也纳城下。窝阔台汗驾崩的消息让蒙古大军东撤，欧洲侥幸逃过一劫，但蒙古的威胁让西方对东方的力量有了深刻认知。
pictures.full_text_en: Merchants from Lübeck and Hamburg formed the Hanseatic League, controlling Baltic trade from London to Novgorod. League convoys escorted merchant ships, league trading posts dotted Northern European ports, and salt herring and amber were major commodities. The Hanseatic League was the most powerful commercial alliance of medieval Europe.

pictures.title: 中世纪的城市自治
pictures.summary: 商人与手工业者用金钱向领主购买城市特许状，获得自治权利。市政...
pictures.full_text: 商人与手工业者用金钱向领主购买城市特许状，获得自治权利。市政厅钟楼高耸于市集广场，行会师傅制定产品质量标准，城市法庭独立审判，城市自治打破了封建等级制度，市民阶层由此崛起。
pictures.full_text_en: Christian kingdoms pushed south from the Pyrenees, gradually reconquering territory held by the Moors. In 1492 Granada fell, the last sultan surrendered the city keys, and the 700-year Reconquista was complete. A unified Spain soon funded Columbus's westward voyage, and the Age of Exploration began.

pictures.title: 拜占庭帝国的荣光
pictures.summary: 查士丁尼大帝在君士坦丁堡修建圣索菲亚大教堂，穹顶直径三十二米...
pictures.full_text: 查士丁尼大帝在君士坦丁堡修建圣索菲亚大教堂，穹顶直径三十二米仿佛悬浮于空中。帝国保存了希腊罗马的文化遗产，东正教仪式在金碧辉煌的教堂中举行，拜占庭是中世纪欧洲最文明的国家。
pictures.full_text_en: Believers walked from across Europe to Santiago de Compostela to venerate the relics of the Apostle James. Hostels and churches lined the pilgrimage route, and pilgrims wore shell emblems as they traveled in groups. This ancient thousand-year road was medieval Europe's most important journey of faith and cultural corridor.

pictures.title: 中世纪的农业革命
pictures.summary: 重犁传入北欧翻开了黏重的土壤，三圃轮作制让土地利用率大幅提高...
pictures.full_text: 重犁传入北欧翻开了黏重的土壤，三圃轮作制让土地利用率大幅提高。马轭的改良让马匹代替牛拉犁，磨坊用水力风车碾磨谷物，农业产量的增长支撑了人口翻番，中世纪欧洲的经济基础由此奠定。
pictures.full_text_en: In 1241, Mongol cavalry crushed the Polish and Teutonic Knight coalition at the Battle of Legnica, and Subutai's iron horsemen reached the gates of Vienna. News of Ögedei Khan's death prompted the Mongol army to withdraw eastward, and Europe narrowly escaped. But the Mongol threat gave the West a profound awareness of Eastern power.

pictures.title: 圣女贞德的壮举
pictures.summary: 十七岁的农家少女贞德声称听到圣徒的声音，率军解奥尔良之围，扭...
pictures.full_text: 十七岁的农家少女贞德声称听到圣徒的声音，率军解奥尔良之围，扭转百年战争局势。她护送查理七世在兰斯加冕，却不幸被勃艮第人俘获交给英军，在鲁昂以异端罪火刑处死，贞德成为法兰西永恒的民族象征。
pictures.full_text_en: Merchants and artisans purchased city charters from lords with money, gaining autonomous rights. City hall clock towers rose above market squares, guild masters set product quality standards, and city courts judged independently. Urban autonomy broke the feudal hierarchy, and the burgher class rose to prominence.

pictures.title: 文艺复兴的曙光
pictures.summary: 佛罗伦萨的美第奇家族资助艺术家与学者，布鲁内莱斯基建造了穹顶...
pictures.full_text: 佛罗伦萨的美第奇家族资助艺术家与学者，布鲁内莱斯基建造了穹顶大教堂。达·芬奇在笔记本上绘制飞行器草图，米开朗基罗在西斯廷天顶描绘创世纪，文艺复兴从意大利点燃了人文主义的光芒。
pictures.title_en: The Glory of the Byzantine Empire
pictures.full_text_en: Emperor Justinian built the Hagia Sophia in Constantinople, its dome 32 meters in diameter seeming to float in the air. The empire preserved the Greco-Roman cultural heritage, Orthodox ceremonies were conducted in gilded churches, and Byzantium was the most civilized state of medieval Europe.

pictures.title: 宗教改革的风暴
pictures.summary: 一五一七年，马丁·路德将九十五条论纲钉在维滕贝格教堂大门上，...
pictures.full_text: 一五一七年，马丁·路德将九十五条论纲钉在维滕贝格教堂大门上，抗议赎罪券的贩卖。印刷术让他的思想迅速传播，新教各派与天主教分裂，宗教战争席卷欧洲，信仰的统一从此破碎，个人良知的觉醒不可逆转。
pictures.full_text_en: The heavy plow reached Northern Europe, turning the dense clay soils, and the three-field rotation system greatly improved land utilization. Improved horse collars allowed horses to replace oxen for plowing, and water and wind mills ground grain. Increased agricultural yields supported a doubling of population, laying the economic foundation of medieval Europe.

pictures.title: 大航海时代的开启
pictures.summary: 一四九二年，哥伦布率三艘帆船西航寻找通往印度的新航路，却意外...
pictures.full_text: 一四九二年，哥伦布率三艘帆船西航寻找通往印度的新航路，却意外抵达加勒比群岛。此后达·伽马绕好望角抵达印度，麦哲伦船队完成环球航行，欧洲人从此主宰了世界海洋，全球化的序幕由此拉开。
pictures.title_en: The Heroic Deeds of Joan of Arc
pictures.full_text_en: The seventeen-year-old peasant girl Joan claimed to hear the voices of saints, led the army to lift the siege of Orléans, and turned the tide of the Hundred Years' War. She escorted Charles VII to his coronation at Reims, but was captured by the Burgundians and handed over to the English. Burned at the stake for heresy at Rouen, Joan became France's eternal national symbol.

pictures.title: 科学革命的诞生
pictures.summary: 哥白尼提出日心说挑战地心体系，伽利略用望远镜观测木星卫星。牛...
pictures.full_text: 哥白尼提出日心说挑战地心体系，伽利略用望远镜观测木星卫星。牛顿在剑桥推导出万有引力定律，科学方法从实验与数学推理中诞生，亚里士多德的权威被推翻，人类对宇宙的认识发生了根本性的转变。

pictures.title: 启蒙运动的思潮
pictures.summary: 伏尔泰在费尔内庄园中抨击宗教迷信，孟德斯鸠提出三权分立，卢梭...
pictures.full_text: 伏尔泰在费尔内庄园中抨击宗教迷信，孟德斯鸠提出三权分立，卢梭宣告人生而自由。沙龙中哲人们激烈辩论，百科全书派将知识系统整理，理性之光照亮了旧制度的黑暗角落，为革命播下了思想的种子。
pictures.full_text_en: The Medici family of Florence patronized artists and scholars, and Brunelleschi built the dome cathedral. Leonardo sketched flying machines in his notebooks, and Michelangelo painted the Creation on the Sistine ceiling. The Renaissance ignited the light of humanism from Italy.

pictures.title: 法国大革命
pictures.summary: 一七八九年巴黎民众攻陷巴士底狱，国民议会颁布人权宣言。路易十...
pictures.full_text: 一七八九年巴黎民众攻陷巴士底狱，国民议会颁布人权宣言。路易十六被送上断头台，雅各宾恐怖统治血洗巴黎，拿破仑在混乱中崛起，大革命摧毁了旧制度，自由平等博爱的理念从此改变了世界。
pictures.full_text_en: In 1517, Martin Luther nailed his Ninety-Five Theses to the door of the Wittenberg church, protesting the sale of indulgences. The printing press rapidly spread his ideas, Protestant factions split from Catholicism, religious wars swept Europe, the unity of faith was shattered forever, and the awakening of individual conscience was irreversible.

pictures.title: 拿破仑的帝国
pictures.summary: 拿破仑在奥斯特里茨以少胜多击溃俄奥联军，法兰西帝国疆域从西班...
pictures.full_text: 拿破仑在奥斯特里茨以少胜多击溃俄奥联军，法兰西帝国疆域从西班牙延伸到波兰。他颁布民法典统一法律体系，但远征俄罗斯惨败，滑铁卢一役终结了帝国，拿破仑的征服将革命理念传播到全欧洲。
pictures.title_en: Dawn of the Age of Exploration
pictures.full_text_en: In 1492, Columbus sailed west with three caravels seeking a new route to India but unexpectedly reached the Caribbean. Thereafter, da Gama rounded the Cape of Good Hope to reach India, and Magellan's fleet completed the first circumnavigation. Europeans henceforth dominated the world's oceans, and the prelude to globalization began.

pictures.title: 工业革命在英国
pictures.summary: 瓦特改良蒸汽机驱动机器轰鸣运转，曼彻斯特的纺织厂烟囱林立。铁...
pictures.full_text: 瓦特改良蒸汽机驱动机器轰鸣运转，曼彻斯特的纺织厂烟囱林立。铁路将煤炭与棉花运往各地，农民涌入城市成为工人，工业革命创造了前所未有的财富，也带来了污染与贫困，现代工业社会由此诞生。
pictures.full_text_en: Copernicus proposed heliocentrism challenging the geocentric system, and Galileo observed Jupiter's moons through a telescope. Newton derived the law of universal gravitation at Cambridge. The scientific method was born from experiment and mathematical reasoning, Aristotle's authority was overthrown, and humanity's understanding of the universe underwent a fundamental transformation.

pictures.title: 意大利统一运动
pictures.summary: 加里波第率红衫军从西西里登陆北上，加富尔以外交手腕促成撒丁王...
pictures.full_text: 加里波第率红衫军从西西里登陆北上，加富尔以外交手腕促成撒丁王国扩张。一八六一年意大利王国宣告成立，罗马于一八七〇年并入，分裂千年的意大利半岛终于统一，民族主义浪潮席卷欧洲。
pictures.full_text_en: Voltaire attacked religious superstition from his estate at Ferney, Montesquieu proposed the separation of powers, and Rousseau declared that man is born free. Philosophers debated fiercely in salons, the Encyclopédistes systematically organized knowledge, and the light of reason illuminated the dark corners of the Ancien Régime, sowing the ideological seeds of revolution.

pictures.title: 德国统一
pictures.summary: 俾斯麦以铁血政策统一德意志，普丹、普奥、普法三战三胜。一八七...
pictures.full_text: 俾斯麦以铁血政策统一德意志，普丹、普奥、普法三战三胜。一八七一年普鲁士国王威廉一世在凡尔赛镜厅加冕为德意志皇帝，德意志帝国崛起改变了欧洲均势，民族国家的统一成为十九世纪的主旋律。
pictures.full_text_en: Eighteenth-century European thinkers raised the torch of reason. Voltaire attacked despotism and superstition, Rousseau proposed the social contract, and Montesquieu designed the separation of powers. Diderot compiled the Encyclopédie to disseminate knowledge, and ideas collided freely in cafés and salons. The Enlightenment laid the intellectual foundation for modern democracy and science.

pictures.title: 俄国彼得大帝改革
pictures.summary: 彼得大帝从西欧考察归来，强制俄国人剪去长须改穿西服。他建立圣...
pictures.full_text: 彼得大帝从西欧考察归来，强制俄国人剪去长须改穿西服。他建立圣彼得堡作为面向西方的窗口，创建海军与工厂，打破贵族对权力的垄断，彼得改革将俄国从落后的封建国家推向欧洲强国的行列。
pictures.full_text_en: Napoleon crushed the Russo-Austrian army at Austerlitz against the odds, and the French Empire stretched from Spain to Poland. He promulgated the Civil Code to unify the legal system, but the Russian campaign ended in disaster, and Waterloo terminated the empire. Napoleon's conquests spread revolutionary ideals across Europe.

pictures.title: 维也纳会议
pictures.summary: 一八一五年拿破仑战败后，欧洲列强在维也纳召开会议重新划分版图...
pictures.full_text: 一八一五年拿破仑战败后，欧洲列强在维也纳召开会议重新划分版图。梅特涅主导建立均势体系，恢复各国君主统治，压制民族主义与自由主义，维也纳体系维持了近四十年的和平，但革命火种终将再次燃起。
pictures.full_text_en: Watt's improved steam engine drove machines into roaring operation, and Manchester's textile mills bristled with chimneys. Railways transported coal and cotton across the country, and rural folk flooded into cities as workers. The Industrial Revolution created unprecedented wealth but also brought pollution and poverty. Modern industrial society was born.

pictures.title: 一八四八年革命
pictures.summary: 一八四八年革命浪潮从巴黎席卷维也纳、柏林与布达佩斯，民众要求...
pictures.full_text: 一八四八年革命浪潮从巴黎席卷维也纳、柏林与布达佩斯，民众要求立宪与民族独立。起义虽被镇压，但封建特权进一步瓦解，农奴制在多地被废除，民族意识不可遏制，一八四八年是欧洲近代史的转折点。
pictures.full_text_en: Garibaldi led the Red Shirts ashore in Sicily and marched north, while Cavour's diplomacy facilitated the expansion of the Kingdom of Sardinia. In 1861 the Kingdom of Italy was proclaimed, and Rome was incorporated in 1870. The Italian peninsula, divided for a millennium, was finally unified, and a wave of nationalism swept across Europe.

pictures.title: 达尔文与进化论
pictures.summary: 达尔文在贝格尔号上航行五年，在加拉帕戈斯群岛观察到雀鸟喙形的...
pictures.full_text: 达尔文在贝格尔号上航行五年，在加拉帕戈斯群岛观察到雀鸟喙形的变异。一八五九年他发表《物种起源》，提出自然选择理论，颠覆了神创论的世界观，进化论深刻改变了人类对自身起源的认识。
pictures.full_text_en: Bismarck unified Germany through blood and iron, winning three successive wars against Denmark, Austria, and France. In 1871, King Wilhelm I of Prussia was crowned German Emperor in the Hall of Mirrors at Versailles. The rise of the German Empire altered the European balance of power, and the unification of nation-states became the dominant theme of the nineteenth century.

pictures.title: 印象派的诞生
pictures.summary: 莫奈在勒阿弗尔港口用快速笔触捕捉日出时分的朦胧光影，这幅《印...
pictures.full_text: 莫奈在勒阿弗尔港口用快速笔触捕捉日出时分的朦胧光影，这幅《印象·日出》被批评家嘲讽却催生了新流派。印象派画家走出画室描绘自然光色，雷诺阿、德加与塞尚各展风采，现代艺术的大门由此推开。
pictures.title_en: Peter the Great's Reforms in Russia
pictures.full_text_en: Returning from a tour of Western Europe, Peter the Great forced Russians to shave their beards and wear Western clothing. He built St. Petersburg as a window to the West, created a navy and factories, and broke the nobility's monopoly on power. Peter's reforms propelled Russia from a backward feudal state into the ranks of European powers.

pictures.title: 英国议会改革
pictures.summary: 一八三二年英国通过改革法案扩大选举权，工业资产阶级获得议会席...
pictures.full_text: 一八三二年英国通过改革法案扩大选举权，工业资产阶级获得议会席位。此后选举权逐步扩展至成年男子，妇女选举权运动由潘克赫斯特夫人领导，一九一八年妇女终获投票权，民主制度在渐进改革中不断完善。
pictures.full_text_en: After Napoleon's defeat in 1815, the European powers convened in Vienna to redraw the map. Metternich established a balance of power system, restored monarchical rule, and suppressed nationalism and liberalism. The Vienna system maintained peace for nearly forty years, but the sparks of revolution would inevitably ignite again.

pictures.title: 马克思主义的诞生
pictures.summary: 马克思与恩格斯在伦敦撰写《共产党宣言》，宣告无产阶级将推翻资...
pictures.full_text: 马克思与恩格斯在伦敦撰写《共产党宣言》，宣告无产阶级将推翻资产阶级统治。资本论揭示了剩余价值的秘密，马克思主义为工人运动提供了理论武器，深刻影响了此后一个半世纪的世界历史进程。
pictures.full_text_en: The revolutionary wave of 1848 swept from Paris to Vienna, Berlin, and Budapest, as people demanded constitutions and national independence. Though the uprisings were suppressed, feudal privileges further eroded, serfdom was abolished in many places, and national consciousness proved unstoppable. 1848 was a turning point in modern European history.

pictures.title: 克里米亚战争
pictures.summary: 英法联军支援奥斯曼帝国在克里米亚击败俄军，南丁格尔在斯库塔里...
pictures.full_text: 英法联军支援奥斯曼帝国在克里米亚击败俄军，南丁格尔在斯库塔里军医院改善护理条件，将伤兵死亡率大幅降低。这场战争暴露了俄国的落后，也催生了红十字运动与现代护理制度。
pictures.title_en: Darwin and the Theory of Evolution
pictures.full_text_en: Darwin sailed for five years on the Beagle, observing variations in finch beaks on the Galápagos Islands. In 1859 he published "On the Origin of Species," proposing the theory of natural selection, which overturned the creationist worldview. The theory of evolution profoundly changed humanity's understanding of its own origins.

pictures.title: 巴黎公社
pictures.summary: 一八七一年巴黎工人起义建立公社，实行普选、政教分离与免费教育...
pictures.full_text: 一八七一年巴黎工人起义建立公社，实行普选、政教分离与免费教育。公社仅存七十二天便被凡尔赛政府血腥镇压，数万公社社员被处决，巴黎公社是无产阶级建立政权的第一次尝试，成为革命史上的悲壮篇章。
pictures.full_text_en: Monet captured the hazy light of sunrise at Le Havre harbor with rapid brushstrokes. "Impression, Sunrise" was mocked by critics yet gave birth to a new movement. Impressionist painters left their studios to depict natural light and color. Renoir, Degas, and Cézanne each displayed their brilliance, and the door to modern art was opened.

pictures.title: 近代欧洲的殖民扩张
pictures.summary: 十九世纪末欧洲列强瓜分非洲，英国从开普到开罗建立殖民链条，法...
pictures.full_text: 十九世纪末欧洲列强瓜分非洲，英国从开普到开罗建立殖民链条，法国占据西非与印度支那。比利时国王在刚果实行残酷剥削，殖民统治给亚非拉带来深重灾难，也催生了民族独立运动的萌芽。
pictures.full_text_en: In 1832 Britain passed the Reform Act expanding the franchise, and the industrial bourgeoisie gained parliamentary seats. The franchise was gradually extended to adult males, and the women's suffrage movement was led by Emmeline Pankhurst. Women finally obtained the vote in 1918, and the democratic system was steadily improved through gradual reform.

pictures.title: 第一次世界大战
pictures.summary: 一九一四年萨拉热窝的枪声引爆大战，堑壕战中索姆河一日伤亡六万...
pictures.full_text: 一九一四年萨拉热窝的枪声引爆大战，堑壕战中索姆河一日伤亡六万英军。毒气与坦克首次投入战场，四大帝国在战火中崩溃，凡尔赛和约埋下新仇旧恨，一战彻底终结了欧洲的旧秩序。
pictures.full_text_en: Marx and Engels wrote the "Communist Manifesto" in London, declaring that the proletariat would overthrow bourgeois rule. "Das Kapital" revealed the secret of surplus value. Marxism provided a theoretical weapon for the workers' movement, profoundly influencing the course of world history for the next century and a half.

pictures.title: 俄国十月革命
pictures.summary: 一九一七年列宁领导布尔什维克在彼得格勒发动武装起义，推翻临时...
pictures.full_text: 一九一七年列宁领导布尔什维克在彼得格勒发动武装起义，推翻临时政府建立苏维埃政权。土地分给农民，工厂交给工人，世界上第一个社会主义国家诞生，十月革命改变了二十世纪的世界格局。
pictures.full_text_en: Anglo-French forces supported the Ottoman Empire in defeating Russia in Crimea. Florence Nightingale improved nursing conditions at the military hospital in Scutari, dramatically reducing mortality among the wounded. The war exposed Russia's backwardness and also gave rise to the Red Cross movement and modern nursing.

pictures.title: 凡尔赛和约
pictures.summary: 一九一九年战胜国在凡尔赛宫签订对德和约，德国被迫割地赔款并承...
pictures.full_text: 一九一九年战胜国在凡尔赛宫签订对德和约，德国被迫割地赔款并承认战争罪责。凯恩斯警告和约过于苛刻将引发新冲突，果然德国民族主义怒火在二十年后再度燃起，凡尔赛体系埋下了二战的祸根。
pictures.full_text_en: In 1871, Parisian workers rose up and established the Commune, implementing universal suffrage, separation of church and state, and free education. The Commune lasted only 72 days before being bloodily suppressed by the Versailles government, with tens of thousands of Communards executed. The Paris Commune was the first attempt by the proletariat to establish a government, becoming a tragic chapter in revolutionary history.

pictures.title: 法西斯主义崛起
pictures.summary: 墨索里尼率黑衫军向罗马进军夺取政权，希特勒在啤酒馆暴动失败后...
pictures.full_text: 墨索里尼率黑衫军向罗马进军夺取政权，希特勒在啤酒馆暴动失败后以合法选举上台。法西斯以民族复兴为号召，以暴力镇压异己，极权统治笼罩德意，民主制度在危机面前显得脆弱不堪。
pictures.full_text_en: In the late nineteenth century, European powers carved up Africa. Britain established a colonial chain from Cape to Cairo, and France occupied West Africa and Indochina. The Belgian king brutally exploited the Congo. Colonial rule brought deep suffering to Asia, Africa, and Latin America, but also gave rise to the seeds of national independence movements.

pictures.title: 第二次世界大战
pictures.summary: 纳粹闪电战横扫波兰与法国，不列颠空战中英国孤军奋战。斯大林格...
pictures.full_text: 纳粹闪电战横扫波兰与法国，不列颠空战中英国孤军奋战。斯大林格勒战役成为转折点，诺曼底登陆开辟第二战场，一九四五年柏林陷落，六千万人在战争中丧生，大屠杀的惨痛教训永远警醒人类。

pictures.title: 冷战铁幕降临
pictures.summary: 丘吉尔在富尔顿演说中宣告从什切青到的里雅斯特已降下铁幕，美苏...
pictures.full_text: 丘吉尔在富尔顿演说中宣告从什切青到的里雅斯特已降下铁幕，美苏两大阵营对峙。柏林墙将一座城市一分为二，核武器的阴影笼罩全球，冷战四十年间世界在毁灭的边缘维持着恐怖的平衡。
pictures.full_text_en: The two Balkan Wars of 1912 redrew the Ottoman Empire's map in Europe, and nationalist fervor spread across the Balkan Peninsula. Serbia's expansionist ambitions clashed with Austro-Hungarian intervention, and the gunshot in Sarajevo ultimately triggered World War I. The Balkans became the powder keg of Europe.

pictures.title: 欧洲一体化进程
pictures.summary: 舒曼计划将法德煤钢生产置于共同管理之下，欧洲煤钢联营开启一体...
pictures.full_text: 舒曼计划将法德煤钢生产置于共同管理之下，欧洲煤钢联营开启一体化进程。从罗马条约到马斯特里赫特条约，欧洲共同体发展为欧盟，欧元取代各国货币，欧洲人在两次世界大战的废墟上建起了和平的堡垒。
pictures.full_text_en: In 1871, Parisian workers rose up and established the Commune, implementing universal suffrage and separating church and state, while armed workers defended the barricades. The Commune was bloodily suppressed by the Versailles government after 72 days, but its spirit inspired later revolutionaries. The melody of "The Internationale" spread across the world. The Paris Commune was the first attempt at a proletarian government.

pictures.title: 柏林墙倒塌
pictures.summary: 一九八九年十一月九日，东德宣布开放边境，柏林市民用锤子与凿子...
pictures.full_text: 一九八九年十一月九日，东德宣布开放边境，柏林市民用锤子与凿子拆除了这堵矗立二十八年的高墙。东西德次年统一，东欧剧变接踵而至，冷战以出人意料的方式终结，欧洲重新走向统一。
pictures.full_text_en: In 1919, the victorious powers signed the peace treaty with Germany at the Palace of Versailles. Germany was forced to cede territory, pay reparations, and accept war guilt. Keynes warned that the harsh terms would provoke new conflict, and indeed German nationalist fury reignited twenty years later. The Versailles system planted the seeds of World War II.

pictures.title: 欧盟东扩
pictures.summary: 二〇〇四年欧盟接纳八个前社会主义国家入盟，从波罗的海到亚得里...
pictures.full_text: 二〇〇四年欧盟接纳八个前社会主义国家入盟，从波罗的海到亚得里亚海，欧洲在制度上重新统一。人员自由流动与单一市场让东欧经济快速增长，但文化差异与经济差距仍是欧洲一体化面临的长期挑战。
pictures.full_text_en: Mussolini led the Blackshirts in the March on Rome to seize power, while Hitler came to power through legal elections after the failed Beer Hall Putsch. Fascism appealed to national revival and violently suppressed dissent. Totalitarian rule enveloped Germany and Italy, and democracy appeared fragile in the face of crisis.

pictures.title: 福利国家的建立
pictures.summary: 二战后英国率先建立全民医疗与社会保障体系，北欧国家推行从摇篮...
pictures.full_text: 二战后英国率先建立全民医疗与社会保障体系，北欧国家推行从摇篮到坟墓的福利制度。高税收支撑高福利，教育医疗免费，贫富差距缩小，福利国家是欧洲社会民主主义的伟大实践，也是人类追求公平的典范。
pictures.full_text_en: After World War II, Europe was divided by an Iron Curtain. Churchill's Fulton speech drew the line between East and West. The Berlin Wall tore a city apart for 28 years, NATO and the Warsaw Pact faced off, and nuclear weapons kept both sides from acting rashly. The Cold War reshaped Europe's political map, and life on either side of the Iron Curtain was starkly different.

pictures.title: 欧洲的文化多元
pictures.summary: 战后殖民地的移民涌入伦敦巴黎与柏林，清真寺与印度餐馆出现在欧...
pictures.full_text: 战后殖民地的移民涌入伦敦巴黎与柏林，清真寺与印度餐馆出现在欧洲街头。多元文化丰富了城市生活，也引发了身份认同的冲突，头巾禁令与移民政策成为政治辩论的焦点，欧洲在包容与排外之间艰难平衡。
pictures.full_text_en: Churchill declared in his Fulton speech that an Iron Curtain had descended from Stettin to Trieste, and the US-Soviet blocs confronted each other. The Berlin Wall divided a city in two, the shadow of nuclear weapons loomed over the globe, and for forty years of Cold War the world maintained a terrifying balance on the brink of destruction.

pictures.title: 新欧洲的挑战
pictures.summary: 欧债危机中希腊濒临破产，英国公投脱欧震动欧盟，难民潮考验着申...
pictures.full_text: 欧债危机中希腊濒临破产，英国公投脱欧震动欧盟，难民潮考验着申根体系。民族主义在多国回潮，极右政党得票攀升，欧洲一体化面临前所未有的挑战，新欧洲在危机中寻找前行的方向。
pictures.full_text_en: The Schuman Plan placed Franco-German coal and steel production under joint management, and the European Coal and Steel Community launched the integration process. From the Treaty of Rome to the Maastricht Treaty, the European Community evolved into the European Union, the euro replaced national currencies, and Europeans built a fortress of peace on the ruins of two world wars.

pictures.title: 北欧社会模式
pictures.summary: 瑞典丹麦与挪威以高税收高福利著称，免费教育从幼儿园到大学，全...
pictures.full_text: 瑞典丹麦与挪威以高税收高福利著称，免费教育从幼儿园到大学，全民医疗覆盖每一个人。工会与雇主协商工资，社会信任度全球领先，北欧模式证明了效率与公平可以兼顾，成为许多国家效仿的榜样。
pictures.full_text_en: On November 9, 1989, East Germany announced the opening of its borders, and Berliners used hammers and chisels to dismantle the wall that had stood for 28 years. East and West Germany reunified the following year, dramatic changes swept Eastern Europe, and the Cold War ended in an unexpected manner. Europe moved toward reunification.

pictures.title: 欧洲科技复兴
pictures.summary: 欧洲核子研究中心发现了希格斯玻色子，空客挑战波音的航空霸权，...
pictures.full_text: 欧洲核子研究中心发现了希格斯玻色子，空客挑战波音的航空霸权，阿尔斯通高铁连接欧洲主要城市。欧盟推出伽利略导航系统与数字单一市场，欧洲在科技领域寻求独立自主，与美国和中国形成三足鼎立。
pictures.full_text_en: In 2004, the EU admitted eight former socialist countries. From the Baltic to the Adriatic, Europe was institutionally reunified. Free movement of people and the single market spurred rapid economic growth in Eastern Europe, but cultural differences and economic disparities remain long-term challenges for European integration.

pictures.title: 绿色欧洲的愿景
pictures.summary: 欧盟提出绿色协议，承诺二〇五〇年实现碳中和。丹麦海上风力发电...
pictures.full_text: 欧盟提出绿色协议，承诺二〇五〇年实现碳中和。丹麦海上风力发电场叶片缓缓旋转，德国太阳能板覆盖屋顶，北欧电动车普及率全球领先，欧洲走在全球应对气候变化的最前列，绿色转型是新世纪的最大挑战。
pictures.full_text_en: After World War II, Britain pioneered a national healthcare and social security system, while Nordic countries implemented cradle-to-grave welfare. High taxes supported high benefits, education and healthcare were free, and the wealth gap narrowed. The welfare state is the great practice of European social democracy and a model of humanity's pursuit of equity.
